canonical_name: a servant in the dress of the court
old Raven, been able to see so far ahead, to order her as a child

that ancient bard who could play till the trees danced
all of Gwenhwyfar's handsomest young knights
all our maids with mops and brooms

the ancient land beneath the waves
a man of flesh and blood
the first woman who had ever come to him
